html:
Camera moving forward
Five identical camera poses are arranged along the optical Z axis. The red arrows indicate forward camera translation.
⚠ Figure failed to load

elements: five identical perspective cameras, each composed of a black sphere (camera center) and transparent image plane with frustum lines
three thick red arrows positioned just before, between, and after the cameras, aligned along the optical (Z) axis
reference Z axis (shown faintly below or behind the cameras)
optional ground grid along the XZ plane to orient the scene

interactions.label: Number of cameras
interactions.teaches: Altering the number of cameras illustrates the camera's motion path, providing a clearer or more minimal sense of continuous forward movement

interactions.label: Arrow Length
interactions.teaches: Changing the length of red arrows visually reinforces the velocity of the camera along the optical axis

interactions.label: Spacing
interactions.teaches: Adjusting the spacing between cameras emphasizes the sequence and continuity of forward translation

demo_steps.title: Static camera position
demo_steps.narration: Here is a single camera with its principal axis pointing to the right. The red arrow indicates the viewing direction, which is along the camera's optical axis.

demo_steps.title: Visualizing forward motion
demo_steps.narration: Adding more cameras along the axis shows the effect of forward translation: the camera advances straight ahead, and each camera instance marks a position along this path. The red arrows all point forward, aligned with the Z axis.

demo_steps.title: Faster forward motion
demo_steps.narration: Increasing the arrow length makes the forward motion much more prominent. This visually emphasizes the forward speed of the camera along its axis, matching what happens as the camera approaches an object.

demo_steps.title: Dense path: Continuous translation
demo_steps.narration: Reducing the separation between cameras fills in the camera path, giving the impression of continuous forward motion. This illustrates how the camera samples the scene as it moves ahead frame by frame.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Wide, slightly elevated view along the XZ-plane, positioned to the left and above the cameras so all frusta and arrows are clearly visible along the forward (Z) direction.
interactionPlan.notes: Align all cameras' optical axes with the Z direction; arrows and camera frusta must not overlap at any slider setting. Use transparent frustum planes and slightly offset arrows. When numCameras increases, ensure all cameras/arrows are spaced evenly and visible. Keep Z axis reference line faint so it doesn't distract from key elements.

attempts.html:
Forward camera translation
⚠ Figure failed to load

discrepancies: Generated figure includes grid lines, which are not present in the source figure
Reference axes and velocity labels in the generated figure are absent in the source figure
Interactive controls and buttons are present in the generated figure but absent in the source figure
The colors of the arrows do not match the original figure precisely
evaluation.notes: The generated figure has additional elements and interactions, but maintains good geometric accuracy.
action_items: Remove the grid lines and reference axes to match the original figure more closely
Ensure the arrow colors precisely match the source figure
Add options to toggle additional interactions to enhance learning

feedback.rationale: The figure's concept is understood correctly (scores 4), but the execution includes unnecessary elements (hallucinations) and minor color errors, which are generator-level issues that can be corrected without changing the plan.
action_items: Remove the grid lines and reference axes to match the original figure more closely
Ensure the arrow colors precisely match the source figure
Add options to toggle additional interactions to enhance learning

Remove unnecessary grid and axis elements for faithfulness.

evaluation.notes: Interactivity is strong but geometry and overall faithfulness to the source could be improved.
action_items: Ensure arrows have double heads like the source figure
Match the number of cameras and their positions more closely to the source
Clarify or remove extra labels and grid that don't appear in the source
